# azion_edge_application_cache_setting (Data Source)

Provides a data source to read an Edge Application Cache Setting using the Azion V4 API.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "azion_edge_application_cache_setting" "example" {
  edge_application_id = 1234567890
  results = {
    id = 123456
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `edge_application_id` (Number) Numeric identifier of the Edge Application.
- `results` (Attributes) Cache setting lookup parameters. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--results))

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) Identifier of the data source.

<a id="nestedatt--results"></a>
### Nested Schema for `results`

Required:

- `id` (Number) The cache setting identifier to read.

Read-Only:

- `name` (String) Name of the cache setting.
- `browser_cache` (Attributes) Browser cache settings. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--results--browser_cache))
- `modules` (Attributes) Cache settings modules. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--results--modules))
- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp.

<a id="nestedatt--results--browser_cache"></a>
### Nested Schema for `browser_cache`

Read-Only:

- `behavior` (String) Browser cache behavior: `override`, `honor`, `no-cache`.
- `max_age` (Number) Maximum TTL for browser cache in seconds.

<a id="nestedatt--results--modules"></a>
### Nested Schema for `modules`

Read-Only:

- `cache` (Attributes) Edge cache module settings. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--results--modules--cache))
- `application_accelerator` (Attributes) Application accelerator module settings. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--results--modules--application_accelerator))

<a id="nestedatt--results--modules--cache"></a>
### Nested Schema for `cache`

Read-Only:

- `behavior` (String) Cache behavior: `honor`, `override`.
- `max_age` (Number) Maximum TTL for edge cache in seconds.
- `stale_cache` (Attributes) Stale cache settings. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--results--modules--cache--stale_cache))
- `large_file_cache` (Attributes) Large file cache settings. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--results--modules--cache--large_file_cache))
- `tiered_cache` (Attributes) Tiered cache settings. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--results--modules--cache--tiered_cache))

<a id="nestedatt--results--modules--cache--stale_cache"></a>
### Nested Schema for `stale_cache`

Read-Only:

- `enabled` (Boolean) Enable stale cache.

<a id="nestedatt--results--modules--cache--large_file_cache"></a>
### Nested Schema for `large_file_cache`

Read-Only:

- `enabled` (Boolean) Enable large file cache.
- `offset` (Number) Offset for large file cache slicing.

<a id="nestedatt--results--modules--cache--tiered_cache"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tiered_cache`

Read-Only:

- `topology` (String) Tiered cache topology.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Enable tiered cache.

<a id="nestedatt--results--modules--application_accelerator"></a>
### Nested Schema for `application_accelerator`

Read-Only:

- `cache_vary_by_method` (List of String) HTTP methods to vary cache by.
- `cache_vary_by_querystring` (Attributes) Query string cache variation settings. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--results--modules--application_accelerator--cache_vary_by_querystring))
- `cache_vary_by_cookies` (Attributes) Cookies cache variation settings. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--results--modules--application_accelerator--cache_vary_by_cookies))
- `cache_vary_by_devices` (Attributes) Devices cache variation settings. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--results--modules--application_accelerator--cache_vary_by_devices))

<a id="nestedatt--results--modules--application_accelerator--cache_vary_by_querystring"></a>
### Nested Schema for `cache_vary_by_querystring`

Read-Only:

- `behavior` (String) Query string behavior: `ignore`, `all`, `allowlist`, `denylist`.
- `fields` (List of String) Query string fields for allowlist/denylist.
- `sort_enabled` (Boolean) Enable query string sorting.

<a id="nestedatt--results--modules--application_accelerator--cache_vary_by_cookies"></a>
### Nested Schema for `cache_vary_by_cookies`

Read-Only:

- `behavior` (String) Cookies behavior: `ignore`, `all`, `allowlist`, `denylist`.
- `cookie_names` (List of String) Cookie names for allowlist/denylist.

<a id="nestedatt--results--modules--application_accelerator--cache_vary_by_devices"></a>
### Nested Schema for `cache_vary_by_devices`

Read-Only:

- `behavior` (String) Devices behavior: `ignore`, `allowlist`.
- `device_group` (List of Number) Device group IDs for allowlist.
